{{Quote|Assault Teams One and Two are to prepare for out-hull operation. There will most likely be an operational crew aboard the projector; they're to locate and neutralize with minimal damage to the projector itself. They'll be joined by Chief Engineer Yal'avi'kema and three of his crew, who will either find a way to collapse the projector to a size we can take aboard or else attach it as is to our hull for transport. All groups are to signal when ready.|[[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]]|<ref name="OF" />}}
[[Chief engineer/Legends|Chief Engineer]] '''Yal'avi'kema''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Chiss officer/Legends|officer]]. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], Chief Yal'avi'kema was the senior [[Engineer/Legends|engineering]] officer aboard the cruiser ''[[Springhawk/Legends|Springhawk]]'', the command ship of [[Force Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]] and [[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] of the [[Chiss Expansionary Fleet/Legends|Chiss Expansionary Fleet]]. In that capacity, he led the boarding party that successfully acquired a [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity-well generator]] above the [[Geroon (species)|Geroon]] homeworld.<ref name="OF">[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']]</ref>
